title: ESMA clarifies expectations in the run-up to the launch of EU’s Consolidated Tapes 01/04/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financia
clean_title: ESMA clarifies expectations in the run-up to the launch of EU’s Consolidated Tapes 01/04/2026 The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financia
summary: The European Securities and Markets Authority (ESMA), the EU’s financial markets regulator and supervisor, has published Questions and Answers (Q&As) on the onboarding of data contributors to the EU’s Consolidated Tapes (CTs), and on the operational rules for the Consolidated Tape Providers (CTPs). The goal is to increase certainty for all market participants in anticipation of the go-live of the EU’s CTs for bonds and for equities.

impacts: Peut affecter les conditions de marché, les valorisations ou l’allocation d’actifs.
